scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: bun test packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/ packages/plugin-cron/tests/ packages/client-tui/tests/ && bun test packages/client-telegram/tests/ && bun test packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/index.test.ts && bun test packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/client.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/config.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/tool-adapter.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: bun test packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test packages/plugin-mcp/tests/integration/
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun test packages/e2e/tests/integration/ packages/e2e/tests/live/ && bun test packages/plugin-mcp/tests/integration/
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/ packages/plugin-cron/tests/ packages/client-tui/tests/ && bun test --coverage packages/client-telegram/tests/ && bun test --coverage packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/index.test.ts && bun test --coverage packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/client.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/config.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/tool-adapter.test.ts && bun test --coverage packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test --coverage packages/plugin-mcp/tests/integration/
scripts.test:ci: bun test --bail 1 packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/ packages/plugin-cron/tests/ packages/client-tui/tests/ && bun test --bail 1 packages/client-telegram/tests/ && bun test --bail 1 packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/index.test.ts && bun test --bail 1 packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/client.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/config.test.ts packages/plugin-mcp/tests/unit/tool-adapter.test.ts && bun test --bail 1 packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test --bail 1 packages/plugin-mcp/tests/integration/
